Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Diabetes self management plan10-Nov-2017Prediabetes (finding)
  • Maintain or reduce HbA1c to target level as part of diabetes self-management.
  • Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight to support diabetes self-management.
  • Maintain blood pressure within target range to support diabetes self-management.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
Musculoskeletal care02-Dec-2013Osteoarthritis of hip (disorder)
  • Patient will report a reduction in hip pain severity to ≤ 3 out of 10 on the pain scale within 3 months.
  • Patient will be able to walk independently for at least 30 minutes without significant discomfort within 3 months.
  • Patient will participate in low-impact physical activity (e.g., walking, swimming) at least 5 days per week for 30 minutes per session.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension01-Jul-1994Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Achieve and maintain blood pressure within recommended target range through lifestyle modifications.
